name: cs2_gsi_data_samples
purpose: Local seed database for runtime-observed CS2 GSI payload formats and field values.
notes: Seeded from listener logs and runtime observations captured on 2026-04-06.
Treat these as observed examples, not a guaranteed complete global schema.
Grenade runtime data has been observed under top-level grenades, not allgrenades.

files.description: Curated summary of runtime payload sections and notable quirks.
Observed values and examples for important fields.
Observed grenade object samples, positions, owners, and types.
